inputs.label: Gross Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of goods including packaging

inputs.label: Tare Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of empty packaging or container

inputs.label: Number of Containers
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical containers in the shipment

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Precision of the output value in tons (0-6 recommended)

formulas.tons_output: Math.round((((gross_kg - tare_kg) * batch_count) / 1000) * Math.pow(10, decimal_places)) / Math.pow(10, decimal_places)
